markdown:
#  What granular permissions are available for the project's Commitments tool? 
##  Background 
In Procore, the term granular permissions refers to task-based privileges that can be granted to users with 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on certain tools through the users' assigned Permissions Template. 
The table below shows the granular permissions that are available for the project's Commitments tool.
##  Answer   
| View Private Purchase Order Contract  | Grants users the privilege to see purchase orders marked as private, without having to add them to the 'Private' drop-down. Users can also view information in the Change Orders tab on private purchase orders. See [View a Purchase Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/view-a-purchase-order).  |  
| --- | --- |  
| View Private Work Order Contract  | Grants users the privilege to see subcontracts marked as private, without having to add them to the 'Private drop-down. Users can also view information in the Change Orders tab on private subcontracts. See [View a Subcontract](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/view-a-subcontract).  |  
| Create Purchase Order Contract  | Grants users the privilege to create purchase orders. See [Create a Purchase Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order).  |  
| Create Work Order Contract  | Grants users the privilege to create subcontracts. See [Create a Subcontract](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-subcontract).  |  
| Update Purchase Order Contract  | Grants users the privilege to edit purchase orders. See [Edit a Purchase Order (Legacy)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/edit-a-purchase-order).  |  
| Update Work Order Contract  | Grants users the privilege to edit subcontracts. See [Edit a Subcontract (Legacy)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/edit-a-subcontract).  |  
## See Also
  * [Which Procore tools support granular permissions?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-granular-permissions)
  * [What granular permissions are available for the project's Change Orders tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-granular-permissions-are-available-for-the-projects-change-orders-tool)
  * [What granular permissions are available for Commitments Workflows?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-granular-permissions-are-available-for-commitments-workflows)


In Procore, a _Permissions Template_ is a set of _role-based permissions_ that can be assigned to one or more Procore users. The permission settings in a template define what actions users can perform and what information they can view in each Procore tool
title: What granular permissions are available for the project's Commitments tool?
